author: doll-agent
content: Added special.rs to ferrolearn-numerical: gamma + lgamma (Lanczos g=7 with reflection for negative x), digamma (recurrence + asymptotic series), beta + lbeta (via lgamma), erf + erfc (Abramowitz & Stegun 7.1.26 polynomial, < 1.5e-7 max error, tail-stable erfc). 10 unit tests pass against known closed-form values (Γ(1/2)=√π, B(0.5,0.5)=π, ψ(1)=-γ, etc.). Full scipy.special is out of scope; this is the high-value subset for ML estimators.
